text.text1: who i am and what did i do for this world, you may ask. well, i am a very young human and, did absolute nothing big to humanity (yet). BUT, i know python, c#... different things. i know math and other staff. also i kinda know how to make games using unity.
text.text2: alright, i am kinda a lier, but... i did something, one demo-version of a game for school project. Also, i made a joke program that translate any language to "Uga-buga" and vice versa. also, here is the list of things that i have done:
